imageAlt: Ecosystem - Smart Tax savings roadmap item preview image
title: Ecosystem - Smart Tax savings
summaryBody: The impact we want is to significantly increase user confidence in their tax payment readiness and reduce tax-related stress, and we will achieve this by automating tax savings into dedicated pots using Open Banking through Sweeping Payments and Variable Recurring Payments.
detailBody: The impact we want is to significantly increase user confidence in their tax payment readiness and reduce tax-related stress, and we will achieve this by automating tax savings into dedicated pots using Open Banking through Sweeping Payments and Variable Recurring Payments.
